Red Kite
More info
eBird
(Milvus milvus)

  • 17/06/26 Travelling in Edinburgh 1 (Sam Shutt) "Flew North over King's Road. Large raptor, noticeably bigger than a buzzard but definitely not as big as an Eagle. Flapping wings and occasionally soaring as a Carrion crow mobbed it. Due to the distance I[...]"
  • 15/06/26 Quarryford to Harestanes Hill 1 (Jarrod Hadfield) "regular in Lothian"
